result.summary: The page has a noticeable horizontal layout overflow: multiple navigation and game-card elements extend beyond the right edge of the viewport. There may also be content partially obscured by the fixed bottom navigation.

issues.description: Game cards in the main content grid are clipped on the right side. The third column is only partially visible, making several game tiles look cut off and potentially hard to tap.
issues.suggestion: Adjust the responsive grid for this viewport, likely to two columns, or make the row an intentional horizontal carousel with clear scroll behavior and consistent card sizing.

issues.description: The category navigation row overflows the screen. The 'Hot Games' tab is cut off at the right edge, which looks broken and may hide additional tabs.
issues.suggestion: Ensure the tab row is horizontally scrollable with proper padding, or reduce tab widths so visible items are not abruptly clipped.

issues.description: The fixed bottom navigation appears to overlap the lower game content, with game tiles visible behind or immediately under it.
issues.suggestion: Add bottom padding to the scrollable content equal to the bottom nav height so cards are not hidden behind the navigation bar.
